nasb.text: And He said to them, “The kings of the Gentiles lord it over them; and those who have authority over them are called ‘Benefactors.’

esv.text: And he said to them, “The kings of the Gentiles exercise lordship over them, and those in authority over them are called benefactors.

cnv.text: 耶穌對他們說：“各國都有君王統治他們，他們的掌權者稱為恩主，

ccb.text: 耶稣对他们说：“外族人有君王统治他们，那些统治者被称为恩主，

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“外邦人有君王辖制他们，他们的掌权者被称为恩主。
